---
title: "Building a share framework for GenAI"
format: html
editor: visual
---

*Key speaker*: Paulina García - Corral

Than et al. 2025 —\> Has been a shift from programming to an interfcace.

**Why us?**

-   Scrape the data

-   Annotate the data

-   Write the code

-   Deal with the computational equipment.

### Is this computational social science? 

When non-computational researches use GenAI tools, what are the doing methodogically?

**Visions of AI —\> Messeri and Crockett (2024).**
